nodes.context: Neapolitan Camorra clan operating in Secondigliano, Naples, involved in drug trafficking and extortion.
Camorra clan from Forcella, Naples; Gennaro Licciardi was second-in-command to boss Luigi Giuliano.
Coalition of Camorra clans controlling drug trafficking and extortion in Naples suburbs.
Camorra clan, member of the Secondigliano Alliance.
Camorra clan, member of the Secondigliano Alliance.
Camorra clan, member of the Secondigliano Alliance; later defunct rival.
Camorra clan involved in the Scampia feud; Licciardi mediated between Di Lauro and secessionists.

edges.evidence_quote: Gennaro Licciardi was the second-in-command to boss Luigi Giuliano.
edges.context: Gennaro Licciardi was second-in-command to Luigi Giuliano of the Giuliano clan.

edges.evidence_quote: He also became the founding member of the Secondigliano Alliance, a coalition of powerful Camorra clans which controls drug trafficking and extortion rackets in many suburbs of Naples.
edges.context: Gennaro Licciardi founded the Secondigliano Alliance, of which the Licciardi clan is a member.

edges.evidence_quote: Apart from the Licciardi clan, the alliance included the Contini, Mallardo, Lo Russo, Stabile, Prestieri, Bocchetti and Di Lauro clans.
edges.context: Contini clan is a member of the Secondigliano Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Apart from the Licciardi clan, the alliance included the Contini, Mallardo, Lo Russo, Stabile, Prestieri, Bocchetti and Di Lauro clans.
edges.context: Mallardo clan is a member of the Secondigliano Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Apart from the Licciardi clan, the alliance included the Contini, Mallardo, Lo Russo, Stabile, Prestieri, Bocchetti and Di Lauro clans.
edges.context: Lo Russo clan is a member of the Secondigliano Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Apart from the Licciardi clan, the alliance included the Contini, Mallardo, Lo Russo, Stabile, Prestieri, Bocchetti and Di Lauro clans.
edges.context: Di Lauro clan is a member of the Secondigliano Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: The clan used its influence to mediate between the Di Lauro clan and the so-called 'secessionists' ... It therefore played an important role in putting an end to the Scampia feud.
edges.context: Licciardi clan mediated between Di Lauro clan and secessionists, helping end the Scampia feud.

edges.evidence_quote: 19 arrests were made in Rome of alleged members belonging to the Licciardi clan and members of the Filippone 'ndrina and Gallico 'ndrina accused of drug trafficking.
edges.context: Licciardi clan and Filippone 'ndrina were jointly accused of drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: 19 arrests were made in Rome of alleged members belonging to the Licciardi clan and members of the Filippone 'ndrina and Gallico 'ndrina accused of drug trafficking.
edges.context: Licciardi clan and Gallico 'ndrina were jointly accused of drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Contini clan, Mallardo clan, Nuvoletta clan, Polverino clan, Moccia clan, Giuliano clan, Catania Mafia family, 'Ndrangheta
edges.context: Nuvoletta clan is listed as an ally of Licciardi clan in the infobox.
